# Head Open Fault

The HEAD OPEN alert (group 4, code 5) fires when the printhead latch is
not fully closed. The printer auto-pauses until the latch is secured.

To clear:

1. Open the printhead and inspect the print path for media or ribbon
   that may be obstructing the latch.
2. Close the printhead and press down firmly on each side until both
   latches click into place.
3. Verify the HEAD OPEN alert clears from the alert table.

The ZT411 does not require a manual resume after closing the printhead;
printing automatically resumes when the latch is secured.
